title: Project Manager (Software /  AI Projects)
description:
AI Lead / AI Manager – Marine (Recruiting on behalf of client)

Our client is seeking an experienced AI Lead / AI Manager to build and lead AI capabilities within their Marine division. The incumbent will establish a dedicated AI team, oversee AI projects, and collaborate with the Group Engineering Centre, Business Analysts, and other Marine transformation verticals including Digitalization, Yard Transformation, Continuous Improvement, and Technology & Innovation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead, mentor, and oversee a small team of AI Engineers (2–3 members).

  • Provide guidance on technical knowledge, project execution, problem-solving, and stakeholder communications.

  • Engage and collaborate with relevant stakeholders to plan, execute, and deliver AI projects end-to-end.

  • Design, develop, and deploy machine learning and deep learning models to solve complex business challenges.

  • Monitor and maintain AI systems for optimal performance, reliability, and scalability.

  • Collect, pre-process, and analyze large datasets to train and validate AI models.

  • Work closely with cross-functional teams—including data scientists, software engineers, and business stakeholders—to integrate AI solutions into existing systems.

  • Stay up-to-date with AI and machine learning advancements and implement best practices to enhance AI capabilities.

Knowledge & Skills

  • Team management and leadership for small AI teams.

  • Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, R, or Java.

  • Experience with machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn.

  • Familiarity with data visualization tools (e.g., Microsoft Power BI) is advantageous.

  • Strong skills in machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision.

  • Data management and project management experience.

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

  • Ability to work independently, collaboratively, and under pressure.

Job Requirements

  • Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

  • Prior experience delivering AI/ML projects, preferably in a corporate setting.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to think critically and creatively.

  • Leadership and ownership mindset, with strong interpersonal skills to manage internal and external stakeholders.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

(EA Reg No: 20C0312)

postedCompany.description:
Talentsis Pte Ltd is a new-age talent acquisition and staffing service company. The company aims to be a one-stop service to provide a full spectrum of HR related services, including but not limited to the following:

  1. Recruitment and Talent Acquisition
  2. Executive Search
  3. Headhunting
  4. Contract & Flexible Staffing
  5. Manpower Outsourcing
  6. Reskilling & Upskilling
  7. HR Consultancy & Advisory Service


(EA Reg No: 20C0312)
